title: FiscalNote Presidential Transcript
description: A presidential transcript record from FiscalNote's PolicyNote API, delivering primary-source verified transcripts of presidential communications including executive orders, proclamations, press statements, and public remarks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the transcript record.

date.description: Date of the communication in ISO 8601 format.

location.description: Location where the communication took place.

duration.description: Duration of the communication in ISO 8601 duration format.

wordCount.description: Total word count of the transcript.

videoUrl.description: URL to the video recording if available.

sourceUrl.description: URL to the primary source document.

verified.description: Indicates whether this transcript has been verified against the primary source.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.
